stories.headline: Clean electricity meets all new demand, curbing fossil fuels, says Ember
stories.description: 2025 was the beginning of the end for coal and gas power, says think tank, but the world is still warming rapidly.

stories.headline: Spain, Slovenia, Ireland push EU to debate Israel pact suspension
stories.description: In a letter to EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas, the three governments say Israel is violating ‘human rights’.

stories.headline: As Iran crisis drags on, fears of global food crisis grow
stories.description: While global food prices have risen modestly so far, the full impact of the conflict has yet to be felt, analysts say.

stories.headline: Fired former UK official says he felt political pressure to approve Peter Mandelson as US ambassador
stories.description: Ex-civil servant felt political pressure to approve Mandelson's ambassadorship despite concerns.
